label: 拉美热情版
texture_guidance: 彩绘瓷砖、热带植物、粗糙墙面、香料颗粒和节奏图案。
scene_prompt: LATIN FIESTA FOOD POSTER. light: bright afternoon sunlight from upper left, saturated wall bounce, crisp tropical shadows. material: painted tiles, rough plaster wall, woven textile, lime slices, spice dust, ceramic bowls, tropical leaves. color: terracotta #C94C2E, turquoise #008C8C, marigold #F6B331, cactus green #2F7D4A, cream #FFF0D0; keep color blocks deliberate. composition: radial or burst pattern around the food, central hero occupies 40-50%; title follows a curved or banner-like path in upper third; decorative pattern stays behind main content. avoid: no Chinese festival motifs, no ink wash, no red-gold lanterns, no generic Italian flag palette, no unauthorized cultural symbols.
design_lessons: 异域风格要用材质和图案建立氛围，同时避免混用不相干文化符号。
